verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Stay In love my brother, stay in love; Stay In love my brother, stay in love; Love will mend your broken heart Love will give you victory Stay in love, my brother stay in love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My Jesus died for you to bring you home again, Stay in love my brother, stay in love, He suffered on the cross to bring you back again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Stay in love my brother, stay in love. My Bible tells me that He is coming with the clouds, Stay in love my brother stay in love I hope to see you there on that bright glorious day Stay in love my brother, stay in love.
